verses.1: When Ephraim spoke, there was trembling.
verses.2: Now they sin more and more,
verses.3: Therefore they will be like the morning mist,
verses.4: “Yet I am the LORD your God from the land of Egypt;
verses.5: I knew you in the wilderness,
verses.6: According to their pasture, so were they filled;
verses.7: Therefore I am like a lion to them.
verses.8: I will meet them like a bear that is bereaved of her cubs,
verses.9: You are destroyed, Israel, because you are against me,
verses.10: Where is your king now, that he may save you in all your cities?
verses.11: I have given you a king in my anger,
verses.12: The guilt of Ephraim is stored up.
verses.13: The sorrows of a travailing woman will come on him.
verses.14: I will ransom them from the power of Sheol.
verses.15: Though he is fruitful among his brothers, an east wind will come,
